# CDenn - Full-Stack Software Developer
# https://www.cdenn.dev
#
# This file follows the llms.txt convention (https://llmstxt.org) to help
# AI language models and crawlers understand this site's content and purpose.

## About

CDenn is a full-stack software developer based in Nairobi, Kenya.
Specialising in Next.js, TypeScript, React, and AI-integrated web applications.
Available for remote roles and freelance/contract projects worldwide.

## Pages

- https://www.cdenn.dev - Portfolio homepage: about, experience, projects, contact
- https://www.cdenn.dev/solutions - Index of all engineering projects and case studies
- https://www.cdenn.dev/solutions/insuremaster - InsureMaster: multi-tenant bancassurance SaaS platform (Next.js, TypeScript, Radix UI, JWT)
- https://www.cdenn.dev/solutions/email-refiner - Email Refiner: AI-powered Chrome extension for Gmail and Zimbra (React, OpenAI API, MutationObserver)
- https://www.cdenn.dev/solutions/ndoa-plan - Ndoa Plan: offline-first wedding coordination platform with M-Pesa integration (Next.js, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Dexie)
- https://www.cdenn.dev/solutions/sefer - Sefer: offline-first Android PDF reader with annotations (Flutter, Riverpod, sqflite)
- https://www.cdenn.dev/services/fintech-automation - Service: M-Pesa Daraja API integration, STK push callback reconciliation, multi-tenant payment systems, and fintech automation for East African businesses
- https://www.cdenn.dev/services/mvp-development - Service: full-stack MVP development in Next.js, TypeScript, and React — scoping, architecture, implementation, and deployment
